# Mermaid

This directory contains the pinned Mermaid browser bundle used by the Hugo
documentation site.

- Version: `11.12.2`
- Source: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mermaid@11.12.2/dist/mermaid.min.js`
- SHA-256: `d0830a6c05546e9edb8fe20a8f545f3e0dc7c4c3134d584bad9c13a99d7a71e0`

The docs site serves this file locally so published pages do not depend on a
runtime CDN request.
